name: Professional
prompt: Rewrite the text in a formal, professional, and business-appropriate tone.

name: Casual
prompt: Rewrite the text in a relaxed, friendly, and casual tone.

name: Enthusiastic
prompt: Rewrite the text with high energy, enthusiasm, and positivity.

name: Empathetic
prompt: Rewrite the text to sound warm, understanding, and empathetic.

name: Direct
prompt: Rewrite the text to be extremely concise, direct, and to the point.

name: Humorous
prompt: Rewrite the text to be funny, witty, and lighthearted.

name: Academic
prompt: Rewrite the text in a scholarly, objective, and formal academic tone.

name: Persuasive
prompt: Rewrite the text to be convincing, compelling, and persuasive.

name: Urgent
prompt: Rewrite the text to convey a sense of urgency, importance, and immediate action.

name: Poetic
prompt: Rewrite the text using poetic, evocative, and highly descriptive language.
